basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Professor (Computer Science) on Contract Basis
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Vidyapith is recruiting Assistant Professor in Computer Science on contractual basis. Master’s degree holders with NET/Ph.D. or equivalent qualifications as per UGC norms can apply.

age_limit.age_details: 11 months or completion of semester (whichever earlier)
age_limit.details: No specific upper age limit mentioned. Candidates should satisfy UGC norms and institutional requirements.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi is essential as medium of instruction is largely Gujarati | other conditions: As per UGC Regulations 2018
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree with 55% marks in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (with required conditions) OR B.E/B.Tech + M.E/M.Tech/M.S OR Integrated M.Tech OR B.E/B.Tech + MCA with First Class etc. (as detailed in UGC norms)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Walk-in-Interview. Candidates must report at the Central Office
Ahmedabad on the scheduled date and time with all original documents and bio-data. Final selection depends on performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear in person for the Walk-in-Interview on 21 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at: Central Office, Gujarat Vidyapith, Near Income Tax, Ahmedabad – 380009
Bring all relevant original documents, bio-data, and certificates.
important_instructions: The post is purely temporary/contractual with no claim for permanent absorption. Medium of instruction is primarily Gujarati. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Gujarat Vidyapith reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment. Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi is essential.

Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi is essential as medium of instruction is largely Gujarati

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific upper age limit mentioned. Candidates should satisfy UGC norms and institutional requirements.

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Walk-in-Interview. Candidates must report at the Central Office, Gujarat Vidyapith, Ahmedabad on the scheduled date and time with all original documents and bio-data. Final selection depends on performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear in person for the Walk-in-Interview on 21 July 2026 at 11:00 AM at: Central Office, Gujarat Vidyapith, Near Income Tax, Ahmedabad – 380009 Bring all relevant original documents, bio-data, and certificates.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The post is purely temporary/contractual with no claim for permanent absorption. Medium of instruction is primarily Gujarati. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Gujarat Vidyapith reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment. Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi is essential.

faq.question: Q1. What is the interview date for Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in-Interview is on 21 July 2026 at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. For which subject is Gujarat Vidyapith recruiting Assistant Professor on contract?
faq.answer: Computer Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for Assistant Professor at Gujarat Vidyapith?
faq.answer: Fixed remuneration of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET/Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations (or equivalent B.Tech/M.Tech/MCA qualifications).

faq.question: Q5. Is NET qualification mandatory for Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Yes, unless exempted as per UGC Ph.D. regulations.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview for Gujarat Vidyapith be conducted?
faq.answer: Central Office, Gujarat Vidyapith, Near Income Tax, Ahmedabad – 380009.

faq.question: Q7. Is the Assistant Professor position at Gujarat Vidyapith permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely contractual/temporary for 11 months or semester completion.

faq.question: Q8. What language knowledge is required for Gujarat Vidyapith teaching positions?
faq.answer: Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi is essential.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed for Gujarat Vidyapith walk-in interview?
faq.answer: All original certificates, mark sheets, NET/Ph.D. documents, and bio-data.

faq.question: Q10. Who founded Gujarat Vidyapith and in which year?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi founded it in 1920.
